title: Immunoblot Assay for Densitometric Determination of Ubiquitin Forms in Drosophila
author: Ágota agy
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.s5teg6n

steps.title: Collect 5-6 mg of synchronized animal...
steps.instruction: Collect 5-6 mg of synchronized animal or tissue samples from Drosophila melanogaster in pre-chilled 1.5 ml microfuge tubes. undetermined

steps.title: Add 100 µl buffer F (in...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl buffer F (in which conjugated ubiquitins remain intact) and 100 µl buffer T (in which all conjugated ubiquitins are converted to monomers) to the samples and homogenize them by plastic tissue grinders. undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at 4 o C, 13000 RCF
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at 4 o C, 13000 RCF. 00:10:00

steps.title: Collect supernatants to new 1
steps.instruction: Collect supernatants to new 1.5 ml microfuge tubes. undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge the collected samples again at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the collected samples again at 4 o C, 13000 RCF. 00:10:00

steps.title: Collect supernatants into new 1
steps.instruction: Collect supernatants into new 1.5 ml microfuge tubes. undetermined

steps.title: Use 1 μl extract to determine...
steps.instruction: Use 1 μl extract to determine the total protein content of the extracts in buffer F.

steps.title: Add 4 x Laemmli sample buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 4 x Laemmli sample buffer to the protein extracts in buffer F and boil. undetermined 00:05:00

steps.title: Incubate the protein extracts in buffer...
steps.instruction: Incubate the protein extracts in buffer T at 25 o 03:00:00

steps.title: Use 1 μl extract to determine...
steps.instruction: Use 1 μl extract to determine the total protein content of the extracts in buffer T.

steps.title: Add 4 x Laemmli sample buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 4 x Laemmli sample buffer to the protein extracts in buffer T and boil. undetermined 00:05:00

steps.title: Load 10 µl of appropriately diluted...
steps.instruction: Load 10 µl of appropriately diluted total protein extract onto 14 %, 1 mm thick Tris-Glycine SDS-PAGE gel, together with ubiquitin standards of 0.5, 1, 2 and 3 pmols. The appropriate loading concentration (determined in Western blot test runs) is the one in which the band intensity of the monoubiquitin appears to be within the band intensity range of the ubiquitin standards.

steps.title: Perform the SDS-PAGE in a buffer...
steps.instruction: Perform the SDS-PAGE in a buffer containing 25 mM Tris pH 8.3, 192 mM Glycine and 0.1% SDS.

steps.title: Perform standard wet transfer of the...
steps.instruction: Perform standard wet transfer of the proteins onto a PVDF membrane in a blotting apparatus (300 mA constant current, in transfer buffer containing 20 mM Tris pH 8.0, 150 mM Glycine and 20 % Methanol). 02:30:00

steps.title: Block the membrane by rinsing it...
steps.instruction: Block the membrane by rinsing it in 5% non-fat milk in TBS at room temperature. 00:30:00

steps.title: Incubate the membrane in anti-ubiquitin antibody,...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membrane in anti-ubiquitin antibody, diluted 1:1000 in TBST-B (TBS supplemented with 0.05 % Tween-20 and 1 % bovine serum albumin) at room temperature. 01:00:00

steps.title: Wash the membrane three times by vigorous shaking in TBS-T
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane three times by vigorous shaking in TBS-T. 00:10:00, 3x

steps.title: Incubate the membrane with the secondary...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membrane with the secondary antibody, a horseradish peroxidase (HRP) conjugated goat anti-rabbit antibody diluted 1:30000 in TBST-B at room temperature. 01:00:00

steps.title: Wash the membrane three times by vigorous shaking in TBS-T
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane three times by vigorous shaking in TBS-T. 00:10:00, 3x

steps.title: Incubate the membrane in Immobilon Western...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membrane in Immobilon Western Chemiluminescent HRP Substrate for 3 minutes, then cover the membrane with Saran Wrap™.

steps.title: In a dark room position a...
steps.instruction: In a dark room position a sheet of X-ray film over the membrane for the appropriate exposure time (20-30 seconds), then develop the film immediately using Tetenal X-ray film processing developer and fixative solutions.

steps.title: Digitalize the developed X-ray films by...
steps.instruction: Digitalize the developed X-ray films by using a digital camera or a high resolution gel documentation system (such as BioDoc-It TM 220 Imaging System).

steps.title: Use the Gel Analysis tool of the ImageJ 1
steps.instruction: Use the Gel Analysis tool of the ImageJ 1.49v software (NIH, Bethesda, Maryland) to determine the density of the bands corresponding to the monoubiquitin and ubiquitin standards. Copy the band intensity data to an excel table for subsequent statistical analysis. https://imagej.nih.gov/ij/index.html

steps.title: Use the band intensity data of...
steps.instruction: Use the band intensity data of the ubiquitin standards (y) and their concentration (x) to generate a calibration curve in MS Excel with the XLSTAT, a statistical software and data analysis add-on for Excel. Create a regression line equation by applying the four parameter curve fit model (which can be found at the dose toolbar), then use it to calculate the ubiquitin concentration of the sample of interest. https://www.xlstat.com/en/
